channel.title: Videogame Art on RaihnForge
channel.description: Recent content in Videogame Art on RaihnForge

item.title: Tiled - Shooter game reskin
item.description: My first mini project using the Tiled application was an enjoyable experience.  A friend of mine made a multiplayer PvP top down shooter game with a html 5 platform.  He had several placeholder graphics that I was able to re-skin to give the game it’s own unique flavor.  See the original screen capture below for comparison.
